case_title: BREE ARLENE TAYLOR VS. GERCEK KARAKUS ET AL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,445.00 FILED BY TAYLOR, BREE ARLENE AS TO DEFENDANT KARAKUS, GERCEK OKAN, MELIS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-28-2024 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE: $50 SERVED APR-24-2024, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT OKAN, MELIS
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM GRANTED*** PER GARCEK KARAKUS REQUEST
REMARK:PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED.
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT KARAKUS, GERCEK
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT OKAN, MELIS

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE: $50 REMARKS: RESPONDENT CAME TO THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE AT CITY HALL, ROOM 456 AND WAS SERVED THE DOCUMENTS. SERVED APR-24-2024, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KARAKUS, GERCEK

ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM GRANTED PER PLAINTIFF REQUEST
REMARK: DEFENDANT'S EXHIBIT'S RECEIVED AT THE WINDOW***

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-28-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-28-2024 BY VISITING JUDGE. PLAINTIFF BREE ARLENE TAYLOR IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANTS GERCEK KARAKUS AND MELIS OKAN ARE PRESENT VIA ZOOM. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: SYLVIA HUSING; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM DENIED*** PER GERCEK KARAKUS REQUEST
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT KARAKUS, GERCEK
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM GRANTED*** PER MELIS OKAN REQUEST

REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT KARAKUS, GERCEK
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-28-2024 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAYLOR, BREE ARLENE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT KARAKUS, GERCEK OKAN, MELIS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
